chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1580 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Priority Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of CMA 6680/2023 3.For hearing of main case 22-11-2023 Mr. Naeemuddin Chachar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocate for respondents-SEPCO. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada, D.A.G. ***** Learned counsel for respondents-SEPCO has submitted a copy of electricity bill of the petitioner, which is to the tune of Rs. 2606458/-. Leaned counsel for petitioner submits that he would deposit the amount, but it may be made in easy installments. Let the bill be paid by the petitioner in three equal monthly installments. After the first installment is paid, electricity of the petitioner be restored. This petition along with listed application is accordingly disposed of in the above terms with consent. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
